technical.lead: Qwen3.6-35B-A3B beats Claude Opus 4.7 on a laptop
technical.body: in Simon Willison's pelican benchmark (Apr 16-17). Discussion continues through the 3-day window. Both Ollama and llama.cpp ship Day-1 support.
Bonsai-1.7B reaches 674 tok/s on RTX 4090 CUDA (3x FP16). Hands-on tutorials and quantization-deployment writeups land back-to-back Apr 17-19. `bankai` (XOR-patch post-hoc adaptation) appears.
OpenClaw 2026.4.14 — (Apr 14, with continuing community reviews inside the window) makes Claude Opus 4.7 the default, adds Gemini TTS, and introduces cloud-backed LanceDB memory. — — ****

technical.lead: Indirect prompt injection over GitHub Actions.
technical.body: Real PoCs land for Claude Code Security Review, Gemini CLI Action, and GitHub Copilot Agent — all three exfiltrate secrets. Anthropic / Google / Microsoft silently patch without issuing CVEs.

: CVE-2026-33824 (Windows IKE, 9.8), CVE-2026-32157 (RDP Client, 8.8), CVE-2026-33826 (AD, 8.0), 168 fixes total. Within the window, — Fortinet FortiClient EMS CVE-2026-35616 — is reported under active exploitation. — — ****
